name: secret
description: /secret <args> — wraps the `secret` CLI (macOS Keychain-backed credentials, dancinlab/secret). Verbs: get · set · delete · list · service. ⚠ `/secret get` exposes the value in conversation context; prefer inline bash `$(secret get <k>)` for tool-invocation patterns. Slash form best for list/delete/service/set. NL trigger via skill ('secret get', '키체인', '토큰 저장', 'credential 가져와').
